news.t: 5 Emerging Market ETFs That Limit China Investments

holdings.infoBox: XC is an equity ETF with a total of 513 individual holdings.

overview.description: The WisdomTree True Emerging Markets Fund (XC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree True Emerging Markets index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of emerging market stocks that are not state-owned enterprises. The fund excludes stocks from China, South Korea, and Taiwan. XC was launched on Sep 22, 2022 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Morgan Stanley: May be short-term pain but long-term opportunity in emerging markets
data.text: Amy Oldenburg, Head of Emerging Markets Equity at Morgan Stanley, discusses how to invest in emerging markets.

data.title: 5 Emerging Market ETFs That Limit China Investments
data.text: Emerging market exchange-traded funds that limit exposure to China may be a better bet for investors as China's stocks get battered.
